overview: I built a full AI eval pipeline this week: SQLite storage, a 6-case golden set, A/B prompt testing, a 5-tab Streamlit dashboard, and a Claude-powered improvement suggester. Key findings: LLM-as-judge varies ±7pts at temp 0.

keyPoints.title: LLM judge varies ±7pts even at temperature 0.0
PM context boosts scores +13–25pts across all feature types
Router v2 fixed intermittent EXPERIENCE misclassification via A/B test
5/6 baseline cases passed at $1.56 total in 20 minutes
Improvement Suggester proposes edits; I decide whether to apply
